title: Mighty Mouthwatering American Beef Burger
description: A jammy and bouncy American dish featuring harissa spice and miso marinate, perfect for midnight cravings and dairy-free friendly

ingredients.name: Ground Beef
ingredients.notes: 80/20 or 70/30 lean to fat ratio works best

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium high heat, around 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, harissa spice, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the ground beef to the bowl and mix until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Divide the beef mixture into 4 equal parts and shape each into a ball, then flatten slightly into patties.
Grill the patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 130 degrees Fahrenheit for medium rare.
While the burgers are cooking, toast the buns on the grill or in a toaster.

Assemble the burgers by spreading a layer of vegan mayonnaise on the bottom bun, followed by a cooked patty, a few slices of lettuce, a tomato slice, a few slices of onion, and a few slices of pickle.
Top with the top bun and serve immediately.
